_how_it_works: Themes and keywords for polymarket_snapshot.py. Each theme is a list of case-insensitive substrings matched against question/slug/description of the top-volume active markets. Edit this file — not the code — when the hot theme changes; the script re-reads it on every run. If the file is missing or broken, the script falls back to built-in defaults and says so in the payload (themes_source).
